notes: Scaffolding only — do not run full suite until Phase 2 L1 >= 95%.

questions.title: Paragraph purpose
questions.text: What business function does COACTUPC paragraph 1200-EDIT-MAP-INPUTS perform? Answer in plain English for a business analyst. No code dumps.

questions.title: Business rules SSN
questions.text: From COACTUPC paragraph 1265-EDIT-US-SSN, extract every business rule as a numbered requirement: "BR-N: The system SHALL …" Source each rule with a seq citation if available.

questions.title: Field data flow CUST-SSN
questions.text: Explain to a non-technical business analyst what COMMAREA field CUST-SSN does in COACTUPC. Which paragraphs read or write it, and what business event triggers each access? No COBOL syntax in the prose.

questions.title: Program summary
questions.text: Write a one-page business description of COACTUPC: What business process does it implement? What are the 5 most important paragraphs and what does each do? What external systems does it interact with? What data does it own vs receive? No code. Cite paragraph names.

questions.title: Hallucination trap
questions.text: What does COACTUPC paragraph 9999-NONEXISTENT-PARA do? Retrieve evidence first. If missing, do not invent business logic.

questions.title: Decision routing
questions.text: In COACTUPC, after map inputs are edited, how does the program decide what action to take next? Which paragraph owns that decision, and what business outcomes can result?

questions.title: Signed amount validation
questions.text: What business rules apply when COACTUPC validates a required signed decimal amount (paragraph 1250-EDIT-SIGNED-9V2 or equivalent)? List constraints a BA would put in a requirements doc.

questions.title: End-to-end update path
questions.text: Describe the end-to-end business path when a user updates account data on the COACTUPC screen: from receiving the map, through validation, decision, and write-back. Name the key paragraphs in order.

questions.title: SSN edge cases
questions.text: What edge cases or risks should a developer not miss in COACTUPC 1265-EDIT-US-SSN (blank vs null, short-circuit, partial SSN)? Use only retrieved evidence.

questions.title: COBSWAIT honesty
questions.text: What does COBSWAIT paragraph MAIN do as a business process? If you cannot retrieve documentation or IR, say so explicitly.
